subagent_rows.reason: The local frontier has improved enough that the highest-value next step is transferability, not another local squeeze.
The board-specific grammar is now mature enough to be turned into a migration-ready template.
Further commercial-aerospace-only tuning now has lower marginal value than testing whether the grammar ports.

interpretation: V1.28J freezes the post-primary direction after commercial aerospace reached a locally mature replay-facing grammar.
The board should now shift from local optimization to portability packaging so the learned execution skeleton can be tested elsewhere without mixing archetypes.
